_comment: Phase-based instruction loading for Trading Desk agents. Each phase is loaded independently based on the current task stage.

domain-activation.purpose: Scan prompt, detect domain keywords, route to correct domain AGENTS.md
domain-activation.load_when: Every prompt — before any work begins

planning.purpose: Framework readiness check, complexity assessment, decomposition decision
planning.load_when: After domain activated, before execution begins

execution.purpose: Core Must Always / Must Never rules, working standards, and safety index
execution.load_when: During active work — file edits, commands, deployments

quality-check.purpose: Quality checklist verification before declaring task complete
quality-check.load_when: After work completes, before reporting success

documentation.purpose: Session notes, status updates, backlog updates, recommendation capture
documentation.load_when: After quality check passes, before ending session

reduction: 55% per-inference (heaviest phase vs original full file)
